programs.title: Earth Sweepers
programs.desc: On their final night in Mongolia, the Earth-Cleaning Bros reflect under a sky full of stars - no signal, no power, just nature. But peace turns to panic as temperatures drop to - 10°C.

programs.title: The Killer I Picked Up
programs.desc: When a hardworking single mom starts a side job as a rideshare driver to help pay for her daughter's college tuition, she becomes the unrelenting obsession of a mysterious rider with a dark past.

programs.title: Taken In Plain Sight
programs.desc: After months of investigation, Abby becomes convinced that she's found her daughter's abductor. With the authorities dismissing her as a grief-stricken mother, she takes matters into her own hands.

programs.title: Ppang Car Road 2
programs.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programs.title: Hit-And-Miss Tour
programs.desc: Waking up early one morning, the Dokbakz are all hungry and ready to head out for breakfast. But when they arrive at the restaurant, they are met with an unexpected surprise.

programs.title: Zombie House Flipping
programs.desc: Keisha is apprehensive about the team's next zombie, which may hurt the potential resale. Add to that a bad foundation and the discovery of termites, this potential flip seems more like a potential flop.
